extraction.one_line_summary: CAVENDISH Mark won the ceremonial Rome sprint after GC teams allowed minor breakaway of BENEDETTI and others, gap controlled under 40 seconds.
tactical_patterns: BOUWMAN Koen actively worked intermediate sprint to deny GEE Derek points jersey, showing secondary competition motivation final stages.
THOMAS Geraint pulled lead-out duty on ceremonial stage, revealing GC team willingness to support sprint outcomes post-classification.
Breakaway held under 40 seconds with 70km remaining indicates sprint teams calibrated effort perfectly without overcommitting early.

rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: positive: first win of 2023 season came on ceremonial stage, suggesting form peaked late or motivation peaks for prestige sprints
rider_signals.GEE Derek: negative: lost intermediate sprint competition despite competing at final sprint, showing vulnerability when directly marked by specialists
rider_signals.ACKERMANN Pascal: negative: crashed in final sprint despite being in leadout position, suggesting positioning risk increases when fighting for ceremonial wins
rider_signals.MILAN Jonathan: neutral: won points jersey but finished second in sprint, revealing stage race consistency over peak sprint speed
rider_signals.GAVIRIA Fernando: neutral: launched early from distance but faded, tactical error common when chasing prestige wins after hard three weeks
